## Analyzers (1)

### [IVRE v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/IVRE)
Fetch details from an IVRE instance.

- **Author:** Pierre Lalet
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `autonomous-system`, `certificate_hash`, `domain`, `fqdn`, `ip`, `network`, `port`, `user-agent`
